_meta.description: Canonical CLEO feature inventory aligned to vision and current implementation

features.name: Shared-Core Architecture
features.details: CLI and MCP route through shared business logic in src/core

features.name: MCP Primary Interface
features.details: 2 MCP tools across 10 domains and 256 canonical operations

features.name: CLI Backup Interface
features.details: 86 commands for human and fallback workflows

features.name: brain.db Foundation
features.details: Decisions, patterns, learnings, observations, memory links, schema metadata

features.name: 3-Layer Retrieval
features.details: memory find, memory timeline, memory fetch, plus memory observe

features.name: SQLite-vec Loader
features.details: Extension loading and vec0 table initialization with graceful fallback

features.name: Cognitive Infrastructure Closure
features.details: End-to-end parity and closure work across BRAIN and NEXUS epics

features.name: Embedding Generation Pipeline
features.details: Embedding generation and vector similarity retrieval as Living BRAIN substrate

features.name: Reasoning + Session Integration
features.details: Causal/similarity reasoning and richer session memory integration

features.name: Full claude-mem Retirement
features.details: Native hook-driven automation replacing plugin dependency

features.name: NEXUS Dispatch Domain
features.details: 12 operations wired in dispatch registry and domain handler

features.name: JSON Registry Backend
features.details: Current project registry and permission management implementation

features.name: Dedicated nexus.db
features.details: Migration target for durable global graph and network storage

features.name: Graph Table Schema
features.details: brain_page_nodes and brain_page_edges tables with indexes and migration

features.name: Graph Traversal API
features.details: BFS/DFS traversal, relation filters, recency and latest-version queries

features.name: Agent-Runtime Foundation
features.details: Foundation service for worker lifecycle, leases, identity, self-propulsion, and patrol motion

features.name: Live Workshop Surface
features.details: The Hearth, Circle of Ten, and Conduit mapped onto the ten canonical domains

features.name: Quality and Convergence
features.details: The Sweep, Refinery, and The Proving for patrol quality, integration readiness, and runtime validation

features.name: Living BRAIN Runtime
features.details: Looming Engine and Living BRAIN runtime behavior, with T5158/T5159 providing embedding and vector substrate rather than the runtime epic

features.name: Four-Layer Anti-Hallucination Validation
features.details: Schema, semantic, referential, and state-machine enforcement

features.name: Atomic Write Pattern
features.details: temp -> validate -> backup -> rename across write paths

features.name: Append-Only Audit Trail
features.details: Operation traceability for mutations and lifecycle events
